title: Add format_bead_history_plain() and format_bead_field() formatting helpers
description: Extend src/agent_takt/cli/formatting.py with two new functions. (1) format_bead_history_plain(entries, *, plain=False, terminal_width=None): renders a list of execution_history dicts as a one-line-per-entry table; timestamps truncated to seconds (ISO-8601 no fractional part); event column padded to a fixed width (derive from max event name length across entries); summary column truncated to fit terminal_width when plain=False, never truncated when plain=True or terminal_width is None. (2) format_bead_field(value): type-dispatch renderer — str returns bare value; int/float returns str(value); bool returns lowercase 'true'/'false'; None and empty string '' return empty string (caller prints a bare newline); list/dict return json.dumps(value, indent=2).
acceptance_criteria: format_bead_history_plain returns one line per entry in ascending timestamp order
Timestamps are truncated to seconds with no fractional part
format_bead_history_plain truncates summary column to terminal_width when plain=False
format_bead_history_plain never truncates summary when plain=True
format_bead_field returns bare string without quotes for str values
format_bead_field returns lowercase 'true' or 'false' for bool values (not Python True/False)
format_bead_field returns empty string for None and for empty string ''
format_bead_field returns json.dumps(value, indent=2) for list and dict values
